prompt: I'm building an OpenClaw plugin and want automatic observability for all exec tool calls. What's the easiest setup?

assertions.name: recommends_plugin_hooks
assertions.description: Recommends the automatic plugin hooks approach (not skill-based)

assertions.name: includes_config_json
assertions.description: Provides the OpenClaw config.json with hook configuration

assertions.name: explains_command_family_mapping
assertions.description: Explains how CLI binaries are mapped to service names

assertions.name: mentions_automatic_tracking
assertions.description: Emphasizes that tracking is automatic with no agent involvement
